steps.title: Separate the group costs
steps.content: The first $30$ people cost $24$ dollars each. The remaining people cost $16$ dollars each, and there are $n-30$ remaining people.

steps.title: Simplify the function
steps.content:
Write the total cost and combine like terms.
$$f(n)=24(30)+16(n-30)$$
$$f(n)=720+16n-480=16n+240$$

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: The function is $f(n)=16n+240$. The answer is A.
